name: Helen Indoor Pickleball
description: Helen Indoor Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Helen, GA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: White County Parks & Recreation
description: White County Parks & Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Cleveland, GA. There are 9 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
